name: Plague
effect: Increase the production of Undercities based on assistants owned.
formula: (200 * x^0.9)%, where x = assistants owned

name: Transmutation
effect: Increase production of all other buildings by 90% per Goblin Bank built.
formula: ×90% per Goblin Bank built

name: Deflagration
requirement: 6,666 seconds Hellfire Blast activity time (This R)
effect: Fix Hellfire Blast duration to 4 seconds, reduce its mana cost by 400, and increase its bonus by 1,600%.

name: Delayed Reaction
requirement: 5,000 seconds Fairy Chanting activity time (This R)
effect: Increase Fairy Chanting duration based on Enchanted Fields, Inns and Blacksmiths built. Also provides a progressively increasing production bonus while active.
formula: Duration: +(0.2 * x^0.8) seconds; Prod: floor(1000 * t^1.5)%; x = Farms+Inns+Blacksmiths, t = FC active time

name: Gilding
effect: While Mana Regeneration exceeds Maximum Mana, increase production of Heaven's Domains based on Mana Regen and Max Mana.
formula: (90 * (x/y)^0.9)%, where x = Mana Regen, y = Max Mana

name: Refraction
effect: Improve offline production based on total spells cast.
formula: round(5 * x^0.85)%, where x = spells cast (Total)

name: Fusion
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Faction Coins found this game.
formula: round(0.7 * ln(1+x)^3)%, where x = FC found this game

name: Vivification
effect: Gain assistants based on Maximum Mana.
formula: +(x^0.5), where x = Maximum Mana

name: Decay
requirement: 1 hour time spent (This Reincarnation) — unlock as Undead
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = time this Reincarnation

name: Synthesis
effect: Increase duration of all spells based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = FC found this Era

name: Soulweaving
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Reincarnations made.
formula: round(2.5 * x^2.25)%, where x = Reincarnations made

name: Corrosion
effect: Increase clicking reward based on time spent this Era.
formula: (3 * x^0.7)%, where x = time this Era

name: Philosopher's Stone
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on Research Points.
formula: floor(x^0.9 / 25)%, where x = Research Points

name: Explosives
effect: Increase production of the building tier with the most spell effects based on Excavation depth. All tied buildings receive the bonus.
formula: (60 + 60 * x^0.6)%, where x = Excavation depth

name: Infusion
requirement: Secrets of the Ancients as Druid
effect: Increase production of Stonehenge Circles based on mana produced this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.75 * x^0.75)%, where x = mana produced this Reincarnation

name: Creeping
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on mana produced this Reincarnation.
formula: (3.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = mana produced this Reincarnation

name: Engraving
effect: Increase FC find chance based on spells cast this game. Also increase FC chance by 100% multiplicatively.
formula: floor(3.5 * ln(1+x)^3.5)%, where x = spells cast this game

name: Adaptation
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as other factions.
formula: (0.05 * (x - y)^0.7)%, where x = All Time playtime, y = highest All Time faction time

name: Transfusion
effect: Gain 300 assistants. Multiplicatively increase assistants based on mana produced this Era.
formula: +(300); (3 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Bloodspring
effect: Get your faction's Bloodline effect for free. Bloodstream counts time spent with both factions.

name: Waste
effect: Increase offline production based on Royal Exchanges purchased.
formula: 120 * x^0.85, where x = Royal Exchanges made

name: Poisons
effect: Increase production of all other buildings by 120% per Spider Sanctuary built.
formula: ×120% per Spider Sanctuary built

name: Mineralogy
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique Buildings based on spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = spells cast this Reincarnation

name: Elixirs
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on Research Points.
formula: (4.5 * x^0.45)%, where x = Research Points

name: Hexing
requirement: 200 Drow Exchanges as Drodead, Research Cursing (D25) & Poisons (A410)
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on mana produced this Era.
formula: (5 * x^0.55)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Melting
requirement: 5,000 Iron Strongholds, any Neutral or Dragon
effect: Increase production of all other buildings by 135% per Wyrm's Den built.
formula: ×(135 * x)%, where x = Wyrm's Den owned

name: Calefaction
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on excavations made.
formula: +(0.15 * x^1.15), where x = Excavation depth

name: Sublimation
requirement: 1 hour Grand Balance activity time (This Game), Research D590 & A1325, as Druid or Dragon
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Unique Buildings built.
formula: (0.8 * x^0.8)%, where x = Unique Buildings built

name: Combination
effect: Select an additional bloodline and gain the base effect of its Lineage.

name: Chemistry
requirement: 1e30 FC found (This Game), Research Customizing (C3000) & Manipulation (S3200)
effect: Increase FC find chance based on total Lineage levels. Also increase FC chance by 300% multiplicatively.
formula: 3 * x^2.25, where x = total Lineage levels
